critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React console warning 'Encountered two children with the same key' for 'weather' and 'sniper' - likely duplicate keys in a list rendering component. Consider adding unique keys.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 Weather V2 Incremental Upgrade complete: (1) by_market_type breakdown added to /api/strategies/weather/health - tracks classified/signals/executed/rejected per market type (temperature/precipitation/snowfall/wind). (2) market_type field added to WeatherSignal and best_signal_this_scan. (3) Negative Celsius parsing fixed in _BINARY_BUCKET_PATTERNS - handles -9°C exact, -11°C or below, -5°C or higher via regex with optional negative sign (?P<val>-?\d+). (4) Non-temperature parsing infrastructure ready: _detect_market_type(), parse_amount_bucket_from_question(), compute_amount_bucket_probability() implemented. (5) Open-Meteo fetches precipitation/snowfall/wind_speed_10m hourly data, aggregated in _parse_open_meteo_response(). (6) UI shows 'By Market Type' card in Health tab with color-coded categories. (7) Type column added to Signals table. (8) Non-temperature market types currently show 0 classified because Polymarket has no active precip/snow/wind contracts - the code is ready when markets appear. 54 open weather positions, all temperature type. Best signal tracking works with market_type field.
